mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_search_outbox (event_id, spu_id, event_type, schema_version, payload, status, available_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{spuId}, #{eventType}, #{schemaVersion}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{availableAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_search_outbox SET claimed_by = NULL, claim_until = NULL, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status = 'NEW' AND claimed_by = #{claimedBy}
